message: Fix RPC CLI API-key propagation and model visibility

files.patch:
@@ -103,6 +103,7 @@ fn build_options(
         resources: ResourceLoader::empty(false),
         available_models,
         scoped_models,
+        cli_api_key: None,
         auth,
         runtime_handle: handle.clone(),
     }

@@ -93,6 +93,7 @@ fn make_rpc_options(
         resources: ResourceLoader::empty(false),
         available_models: Vec::new(),
         scoped_models: Vec::new(),
+        cli_api_key: None,
         auth,
         runtime_handle: handle.clone(),
     }

@@ -111,6 +111,7 @@ fn setup_rpc(
         resources: ResourceLoader::empty(false),
         available_models: Vec::new(),
         scoped_models: Vec::new(),
+        cli_api_key: None,
         auth,
         runtime_handle: runtime_handle.clone(),
     };
